name: Atlantic Express Comms
notes: No confident FMCSA carrier match for 'Atlantic Express Comms' at 75 Maiden Ln, New York NY 10038. The legacy Atlantic Express Transportation Group (NYC school bus operator headquartered in Staten Island; USDOT records show physical address in Staten Island, not 75 Maiden Lane) declared Chapter 11 bankruptcy in late 2013 and ceased operations. SAFER carriers named 'Atlantic Express' returned multiple unrelated entries (Euless TX, Joplin MO, freight/logistics entities) — none match 75 Maiden Lane NYC. NY DOS search did not surface a current entity exactly named 'Atlantic Express Comms' or 'Atlantic Express Communications.' 75 Maiden Lane is a multi-tenant office building; likely a registered-agent or mailing address for a holdco/communications-related shell rather than a bus operator. Flag for manual NY DOS lookup.

name: Harlow's School Bus
fmcsa_address: 1021 S 23rd Street Suite A, Bismarck, ND 58504
registry_source: SD Secretary of State (not directly retrieved); company materials
notes: FMCSA carrier match is to the consolidated parent entity 'HARLOWS SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC' (USDOT 1662560), MC-611352, principal office in Bismarck, ND. Vermillion SD (1218 Compton Ct) is a branch terminal; Harlow's operates ~30 locations across ND/SD/MT/ID/WA. Power units (401) and drivers (480) reflect the consolidated fleet, not just the Vermillion branch. Safety rating Satisfactory (05/19/2025). MCS-150 dated 10/21/2024. Related/legacy SAFER records: HARLOW'S BUS SERVICE INC (USDOT 321336, Bismarck, 12 PU/22 drivers, Satisfactory) and HARLOW'S SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC OF MONTANA (USDOT 703193). Founded 1973 by Harlow Hageness. Confidence medium because input row implies SD-only operation but the active SAFER record consolidates the multi-state operation under the ND-domiciled entity.
